title: CompactionReport
description: Output of TierAwareCompactor.run(). Records what was compacted, retained, skipped, and any errors.

generated_at_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this report was generated.

blocked.description: True if compaction was skipped because the current run is blocked (exit_code==1 without --force).

compacted.description: Paths of artifacts that were compacted (NDJSON rolling window applied).

retained.description: Paths of artifacts that were examined and retained without modification.

skipped_hot.description: Paths of hot-tier artifacts that were explicitly skipped (never compacted).

errors.description: Error messages for any artifacts that could not be processed.
